notes:
### v1.3.1

#### Fixed
- Dashboard daily and raid summaries are more accurate. Completed lazy dailies now count correctly for the current reset, and non-gold tracked raids are included as additional raid progress.
- Welcome screen polish. The welcome screen now uses the current app icon and can be dragged with the custom title bar.

#### Improved
- Dashboard labels now show more useful details. Raid, daily, weekly, calendar event, Argeos, and gold labels now open compact popups with clearer progress, availability, and focus behavior.
- Weekly gold progress handles difficulty mismatches better. Planned and cleared difficulty mismatches now show both lost gold and bonus gold. Extra bonus gold no longer hides still-open planned gold.
- Icons and images now load from bundled app assets. The app now uses the new bundled assets folder for icons and images instead of the old static images folder.

## Installation
Download `loatracker_1.3.1_x64-setup.exe` below.
